title: coelandria smillieae
intro: Coelandria smillieae, also known as the Smillie's Coelandria, is a flowering plant species in the family Goodeniaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coelandria smillieae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
